Package de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.model.impl

Class ExecutionStart

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.model.impl.AbstractExecutionElement
de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.model.impl.AbstractExecutionNode<SourceElement>
de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.model.impl.ExecutionStart
All Implemented Interfaces:
IExecutionElement, IExecutionNode<SourceElement>, IExecutionStart
public class ExecutionStart extends AbstractExecutionNode<SourceElement> implements IExecutionStart
The default implementation of IExecutionStart.
